source_schema_note: Source run predates the standardized measurement_mode field. Public copy preserves the observed API datapoint and adds publication metadata.

error.message: Qwen 401 authentication error. Vendor detail redacted; no credential is included.

publication_notes: This is a Clarivy-owned public self-audit datapoint, not third-party customer data.
Empty responses and error responses are preserved as evidence of the run state and must not be treated as confirmed negative visibility signals.
